components: SagaExecutor - Graph-based workflow execution with routing
saga_models.py - Data structures for saga definitions
capabilities: Traversal limits and recursion depth protection

prompt_handling.current_approach: Prompts loaded from files or inline strings
prompt_sources: Step definition 'prompt' field (file path or inline text)
limitations: No saga context available to steps

state_contents.state: Array of StateEntry objects (node execution history)
state_contents.subsagas: Array of SubSagaEntry objects (child saga references)

missing_features: Step output logging separate from state
Verify script parameters don't include state context

verify_script_contract.current_approach: Verify scripts invoked with no parameters

outputs.exit_code: 0 for success, 1 for hard failure, 2 for self-correction

limitations: No access to saga state directory
Cannot derive working directories from context
Error messages not propagated to next step

missing_fields: enrichment - Custom variables for prompt enrichment

relevant_adrs: ADR-008: Devin CLI Saga Orchestration - Graph-based execution with verification
ADR-009: Saga State Persistence - File-based state storage and recovery

related_code_patterns.state_management: SagaStateManager uses atomic writes (write to temp, then replace)
related_code_patterns.error_handling: Exit codes used for routing decisions (0=pass, 1=fail, 2=self-correct)
related_code_patterns.logging: Unified execution logger with indentation for nesting depth
related_code_patterns.file_organization: Step definitions in steps/<name>/step.json with optional scripts/ and prompts/ subdirectories

existing_tests: test_state_integration.py - Integration tests for state tracking
architectural_constraints: Saga definitions are JSON files (no dynamic generation)
Devin CLI is the execution engine (non-interactive mode)

implementation_readiness.saga_state_infrastructure: Ready - SagaStateManager already handles file I/O
implementation_readiness.devin_wrapper_integration: Needs enhancement - Verify script invocation needs parameters
